name: Midnight Oud Extrait
description: A commanding blend of aged agarwood, dark leather, and spicy saffron. Built for evening wear.

name: ErgoMech Pro Keyboard
description: Split ergonomic mechanical keyboard with tactile switches and a brushed aluminum chassis.

name: Artisan Espresso Machine
description: Dual-boiler espresso maker with pressure profiling and solid walnut accents.

name: Citrus Ascend
description: Crisp Italian bergamot cut with ocean salt and a heavy cedarwood base.

name: AeroNoise Cancelling Over-Ears
description: Studio-grade wireless headphones with adaptive ANC and 40-hour battery life.

name: Full-Grain Leather Messenger
description: Hand-stitched leather bag designed to hold a 16-inch laptop and daily carry essentials.

name: Desert Vetiver
description: Dry, earthy vetiver rooted in sandalwood and black pepper.

name: Ultrawide Creator Display
description: 34-inch 5K monitor with 99% DCI-P3 color accuracy for design and engineering.

name: Minimalist Carbon Wallet
description: RFID-blocking front pocket wallet forged from aerospace-grade carbon fiber.

name: Velvet Rose & Smoke
description: Damascus rose wrapped in tobacco leaf and vanilla absolute.

name: Nomad Power Station
description: 25,000mAh magnetic power bank with 65W fast charging for laptops and phones.

name: Automatic Diver Watch
description: Surgical steel dive watch with a ceramic bezel and a 72-hour power reserve.

name: Sartorial Noir
description: A sharp, peppery scent designed to emulate the atmosphere of a bespoke tailor's shop.

name: Haptic VR Gloves
description: Next-gen spatial computing gloves with force-feedback micro-motors.

name: Matte Black Fountain Pen
description: Machined brass body with a titanium nib. Includes a 50ml bottle of waterproof ink.

name: Alpine Frost
description: An icy burst of peppermint, juniper berry, and white musk.

name: Smart Posture Chair
description: Mesh office chair with built-in sensors that adjust lumbar support dynamically.

name: Cast Iron Dutch Oven
description: Enamel-coated 6-quart pot. Perfect for sourdough baking and slow roasts.

name: Amber Resonance
description: A glowing, warm fragrance featuring labdanum, benzoin, and a touch of cinnamon.

name: Portable SSD 4TB
description: Rugged, water-resistant solid state drive with read speeds up to 2000MB/s.
